finding_results.notes: Recast the repeated negate-then-restate beats into varied sentence movements: folded one correction into a single sentence, shifted one into a comparative, merged one into forward motion, and let the post-dinner quiet ride on image rather than reversal. Also revised a nearby extra beat at line 245 so the same cadence did not reappear immediately after the packet fixes.
finding_results.summary: Nate's interiority remains self-revising, but the chapter no longer leans on the same blunt correction ladder across the cited beats.

summary: Resolved the packet's prose tic by varying Nate's self-correcting movement across the chapter while preserving voice, scene pressure, and continuity.
